no_overlap_assertion: This kernel does not claim material identity, properties, relationships, composition, constraints, context, lineage, chemical interaction, assembly sequence, or specification requirement truth.
mandatory_assertions: Taxonomy kernel does not own material truth
Material DNA kernel does not own UI navigation surfaces
No execution system may mutate this kernel
Observational intelligence may not mutate this kernel
Projections are derived, not primary truth
admission_requirements: Taxonomy nodes must reference canonical entities from upstream truth kernels
Taxonomy may not create material truth by creating nodes
lineage_policy: Node additions/removals are append-only versioned events.
projection_policy: Taxonomy projects upstream truth entities into navigable paths. Navigation truth only.
